channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Justin Bieber’s Post-Coachella Streams Aren’t Done Spiking Yet
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to this week's music update. We're diving into the latest trends and numbers on Billboard. From Coachella performances to viral TikTok hits, let's see what's making waves in the music industry.
[Short music transition]
Host: Justin Bieber's Coachella performance has been a game-changer for the pop superstar. After his headlining appearance, his streams tripled, and he's now experiencing his best streaming days of 2026. In fact, on Monday, April 20th, he racked up 32.4 million official on-demand US streams, a 12% gain from the previous Monday. This is a significant boost, especially considering he only had four days with over 30 million streams in all of 2025, despite releasing new music.
[Short music transition]
Host: But Justin Bieber isn't the only one making waves. New artist F3miii is filling a void in the music scene, particularly for fans missing Frank Ocean. His catchy single "Noble" has taken over TikTok and debuted on the official UK Singles Chart. The Dublin-based Nigerian-Irish singer-songwriter isn't shy about his influences, and it's clearly working in his favor.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's it for this week's update. From Coachella performances to emerging artists, the music landscape is always changing. Stay tuned for more updates, and we'll catch you in the next one.
